Incredible to see how LLMs are fixing people’s chronic health issues.

This is one of many examples of ChatGPT identifying a longstanding problem and suggesting lifestyle changes to fix it.

Many are the type of thing a doctor wouldn’t know (e.g. your exact pillow or desk setup). https://t.co/R6ZA8MEdG1
More examples from this thread on the types of things people are discovering (and fixing) thanks to LLMs. https://t.co/xp1O3g0mA1
